notes: Phase 2 local development fixture configuration only.
The private key is Hardhat's publicly documented local account #0 key and must never be used on a live network.
The verifierAddress value is Hardhat's deterministic first deployment address; deployment.json is authoritative after running deploy_verifier_phase2.js.
All Phase 2 outputs must be written under baseline_results/phase2 and must not append to evaluation/*.csv.
